title: Christmas Dog Toy Stocking – 4Pcs Dog Play Set (Assorted Designs) 1 Pack Included– Festive Dog Gift Set with Plush, Rope & Squeaky Toys – Xmas Present For Dogs
features: Make your dog’s Christmas extra special with the Paws Behaving Badly 4 Pack Dog Play Toy Stocking. Each festive stocking contains a mix of plush, rope, and squeaky toys to keep your pup entertained all season long.
Available in assorted designs featuring Santa, Snowman, and Penguin characters (designs sent at random and subject to availability).
The perfect holiday gift for dogs of all sizes, this festive set offers great value and endless fun. Whether it’s playtime or cuddle time, your dog will love their new Christmas toys.
🎅 Festive 4-Piece Toy Set – Includes 4 fun dog toys: plush squeaky toy, rope toy, and rubber chew toy in a Christmas stocking pack.
🧸 Assorted Holiday Characters – Features cute designs such as Santa, Snowman, and Penguin – styles may vary depending on availability.
🐾 Perfect Christmas Gift for Dogs – Treat your furry friend to hours of festive fun with this ready-to-gift toy stocking.
💪 Durable & Safe Playtime – Made from pet-safe materials designed for light to moderate chewing and interactive play.
🎁 Ready to Gift – Comes pre-packed in a colourful Christmas stocking – ideal for under the tree or as a stocking filler for pets.
